# Slidescape

> Slidescape is a free online strategy board game inspired by Chickapig. Players slide penguins across a shared ice board — past ice blocks and a roaming elephant seal — racing to escape their penguins through their own goal. It runs entirely in the browser with no download or sign-up, and can be played against AI opponents, friends (via a private room code), or strangers through public matchmaking. Slidescape is a fan-made game and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Chickapig.

## What it is

- A free, browser-based abstract strategy board game.
- A Chickapig-style / Chickapig alternative you can play online for free.
- Single-player (vs AI bots) and multiplayer (private rooms + public matchmaking).

## How to play

- Roll for a number of moves each turn and spend them sliding your pieces.
- Penguins slide in a straight line until blocked by a piece, an ice block, the elephant seal, a fence, or the board edge.
- Ice blocks and the elephant seal can be repositioned to open paths or block opponents.
- Line a penguin up with your goal lane and slide it out to score.
- First to escape the target number of penguins wins.

## Game modes

- Beginner: quick two-player game, first to escape 4 penguins.
- Standard: deeper two-player game to 10 escapes.
- Classic: four-player free-for-all.

## Links

- Play Slidescape: https://playslidescape.com/
